message:
chore: Bump version to 0.1.62 and update dependencies

Version bump 0.1.61 → 0.1.62 for the export-html feature release.
Cargo.lock refresh includes transitive dependency updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
